m1.subject: RE: Q3 figures review — input needed
m1.snippet: Could you send me your comments before Thursday? Attaching the latest version of the pack…

m2.subject: Steering committee minutes
m2.snippet: Attached are Monday's minutes with the agreed action items and owners…

m3.snippet: The self-assessment window closes this Friday at 6 pm…

m6.subject: Proposal draft v2
m6.snippet: I've incorporated legal's feedback, pending your final review…

m7.subject: Office access during the holidays

m8.subject: FW: Vendor quote comparison
m8.snippet: Forwarding the comparison table we discussed — option B looks best…

panic.body1: Thanks for the quick turnaround on the Q3 figures. I've reviewed the summary and overall it looks solid — the variance analysis on the LATAM accounts is especially clear.
panic.body2: Two small things before we send it upstairs: could you double-check the FX assumptions on slide 7, and align the headcount table with what Finance reported last week? Once that's in, I'll forward the pack to the committee.
panic.quotedBody: Sending over the consolidated Q3 figures for review. Flagging that the services line still carries the September adjustment — happy to walk through it if useful.

c1.name: Elena Vidal
c1.snippet: Perfect, I'll take a look now

c2.name: Project Q3
c2.snippet: A. Fernández: I've updated the deck

panic.msg1: Hi! Did you get a chance to look at the Q3 figures?
panic.msg2: Just went through them — overall looks solid 👍
panic.msg3: Great. Can you double-check the FX assumptions on slide 7?
panic.msgMine: On it. I'll ping you once the headcount table is aligned with Finance.
panic.msg4: Perfect, thanks. I'll forward the pack to the committee after that.

slackContent.channelTopic: Q3 close · figures review & committee pack

panic.msg1: morning all — pushed the updated Q3 deck to the drive 📊
panic.msg2: thanks! reviewing now. the LATAM variance section looks much clearer
panic.msg3: one thing: can someone confirm the FX assumptions on slide 7?
panic.msgMine: on it — I'll align the headcount table with Finance and report back
panic.msg4: great, once that's in I'll forward the pack to the committee 🙌
